'''Rathe Camalon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Tapani Noble Houses|Noble]] [[House Cadriaan]] within the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. By around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Camalon had come to hold the title of [[Baron/Legends|Baron]], although he was looked down upon by some other members of the house due to his heritage. Camalon's [[Rathe Camalon's father|father]] had been from the [[Freeworlds Territory]] within the Tapani [[Sector/Legends|sector]], and had bought his way into a noble house. The ostracization Camalon faced due to this caused him to develop a near obsessive hatred of noble born house members, who he believed descended effortlessly through the ranks of their houses.<ref name="LotE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rathe Camalon was first mentioned in the campaign guide included in ''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'', a [[1997]] supplement written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Chris Doyle]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]].
